title: Copdock Mill Natural Dog Treats Gift Box - Includes Ham Bone, Dried Beef Ear, Pig Ear, Rabbit and Chicken Feet, Dried Beef Trachea, and More
features: NATURAL DOG TREATS - The Copdock Mill Natural Dog Treats Gift Box makes an ideal gift for your furry friend for their Birthday, Christmas or just because they have been an extra good Pooch!

THE GIFT BOX INCLUDES - The Gift Box includes: 1x Ham Bone, 1x Dried Beef Ear With Hair, 1x Dried Pig Ear, 100g Rabbit ears, 100g Rabbit ears with Fur, 100g Dried Chicken Feet & 100g Dried Beef Trachea
DENTAL HYGINE- The Natural Dog treats are crispy making them a great way of improving your dog's dental hygiene removing plaque.

WITH THE FUR? - Some of the Natural Treats are with fur which gives the added benefits of improved digestion, as the fur acts as a natural brush in the digestive system brushing away food residue and cleaning the dietary track. The fur also acts as a natural dewormer in your dog's digestive system.

TOO MUCH OF A GOOD THING - We recommend feeding your dog a Maximum of 5 Natural Treats per week to ensure they are maintaining a balanced diet. We also recommend that these are consumed whilst supervised.
